text:
It was great meeting you today at the R Special K presentation at NYU, I wanted to make this announcement while being there but there was no time left or so and the lady sitting on the back (Heather?) kindly told me to post here instead.

I have the pleasure to invite you to MeasureCamp NY happening on 3/28/26 at Publics Sapient 375 Hudson St, New York, NY 10014. This is the local version of MeasureCamp which has events all over the world, on the same day there will be others in Helsinki, Melbourne and Sri Lanka.

MeasureCamp is an analytics un-conference, with focus of lowering the barrier so anybody can present and network, industry experts come from all over the world to support the events and also present. Breakfast, lunch and after drinks will be served. Starts 9am to (tentative) 9pm.
I specifically wanted to share in this group as I've noticed R is gaining prominence in the data analytics industry (web, apps, etc) with emphasis in campaign attribution and solutions such as Marketing Mix Modeling.

Early in the morning there will be a board on the wall, if you want to present just write the topic on the board can be beginner focused content, advanced, tech, biz, etc there will be 5-6 rooms and a session on each. The guys from Analytics Power Hour will be recording a podcast episode, etc, it will be fun.

There are about 40 tickets left so if interested, act fast, I hope to see you there!
Linkedin of MCNY:
<https://www.linkedin.com/company/measurecamp-new-york/posts/?feedView=all>
MeasureCamp London so you can get an idea of the event:
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lfuMHgNJy6Y>
Session board from last year:
<https://session-board.replit.app/new-york/2025-04-05>
NY event info:
<https://newyork.measurecamp.org/>
NY event tickets:
<https://newyork.measurecamp.org/registration/>

We are also looking for volunteers to help the day of the event, not the whole day, we are all volunteers and also want to present/attend sessions.

If you have any questions regarding presenting or volunteering please let me know.

attachments.text: Browse conference sessions by time slot and room. Sessions are added throughout the day as participants propose them.
